g.text: User kahan se login karta hai

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does login work on a web app?')
sendPrompt('How does mobile app authentication work?')
sendPrompt('How does OAuth social login work?')
sendPrompt('How does SSO single sign on work?')
sendPrompt('What does an auth gateway do?')
g.text: Request intercept · Validate credentials · Block unauthorized · Rate limit

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does MFA multi factor authentication work?')
sendPrompt('How does session based authentication work?')

g.text: Kaun kya access kar sakta hai

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is RBAC role based access control?')
sendPrompt('What are permissions and scopes in auth systems?')
sendPrompt('What is resource level access control?')
sendPrompt('How are users and auth tokens stored securely?')

svg.text: n8n suspicious login detect kare toh automatically alert ya account lock kar sakta hai
